description: Hand-written retrieval eval set. Each query has one or more answer substrings that must appear verbatim (case- and whitespace-insensitive) in a relevant passage. A retrieved chunk is judged relevant if it contains any of the substrings. Substrings are short canonical phrases from the bundled public-domain corpus to stay stable across editions; if scripts/00_prepare_corpus.py warns that a substring is missing, adjust it to match your fetched edition.

queries.question: What did Alice fall down at the start of her adventure?
What was the White Rabbit worried about being?
What was written on the little cake Alice found?
What did Alice exclaim when she started growing?
What name is given to the man explaining time travel?
How does the Time Traveller describe time relative to space?
What are the small, gentle future people called?
What are the underground creatures in the future called?
How does Watson describe first meeting Holmes over a discovery?
Where had Watson served as an army doctor before meeting Holmes?
What word was written in blood on the wall at the crime scene?
What is the address of the rooms Holmes and Watson share?
